metadata.description: Visual Artifacts — a Claude Code skill that turns any project or idea into a shareable, diagram-driven HTML explainer. Install: /plugin marketplace add svag2003/visual-artifacts  then  /plugin install visual-artifacts@visual-artifacts

plugins.name: visual-artifacts
plugins.description: Diagram-driven HTML explainers (Technical Architecture / User Workflow / Business Strategy) of any project — readable by both humans and agents.
